REQUIREMENTS

Successful completion of the Digital Storytelling and Poetics minor requires the following:

Course

Title

Credits

ENGL295 Introduction to Digital Storytelling and Poetics 3 (Introduction to Digital Storytelling and Poetics)

Approved courses (at least twelve credits at the 3xx- or 4xx-level, with 12 three credits at the 4xx-level), including: 1

• A minimum of one course (three credits) on critical analysis &

theory, and

• A minimum of one course (three credits) on craft & creative

process.

Digital Portfolio

Digital Storytelling and Poetics Minor

Submission of a portfolio of critical and creative work is required. 2
